zh.lifeSummary: Leuca de Mobberley於1178年出生在英國英格蘭爾莫波利。她於1180年與Sir John de Hellesby在英國英格蘭爾莫波利結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Leuca de Mobberley于1178年出生在英国英格兰爾莫波利。她于1180年与Sir John de Hellesby在英国英格兰爾莫波利结婚。他们至少是8个儿子的父母。她去世在英国英格兰爾。

nameMeanings.name: Mobberley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Moverley
meanings: English: a Yorks variant of   Mobberley  .

variants.name: Moberly
meanings: English (southern): habitational name from Mobberley in Cheshire. The placename derives from Old English mōt ‘meeting’ + burg ‘fortress’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

variants.name: Moberley
meanings: English (Worcestershire and Hampshire): variant of   Moberly  .

nameMeanings.name: Leuca
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Luke  , now also used in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Luke
meanings: Middle English vernacular form of Lucas , Latin form of the post-classical Greek name Loukas ‘man from Lucania’. This owes its perennial popularity throughout Christian Europe to the fact that, from the 2nd century onwards, the third gospel in the New Testament has been ascribed to the Lucas or Luke mentioned at various places in Acts and in the Epistles. Little is known about him beyond the facts that he was a doctor, a Gentile, and a friend and convert of St Paul. The name was borne by the character Luke Skywalker in the film Star Wars ( 1977 ), and rose sharply in popularity in the 1990s.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Leuca de Mobberley was born in 1178, in Mobberley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Sir John de Hellesby in 1180, in Mobberley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. She died in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Leuca de Mobberley est née en 1178, à Mobberley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Sir John de Hellesby en 1180, à Mobberley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Elle est décédée à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Leuca de Mobberley wurde 1178 in Mobberley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat 1180 in Mobberley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John de Hellesby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne. Sie starb in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Leuca de Mobberley è nata il nel 1178 nel Mobberley, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Sir John de Hellesby nel 1180, nel Mobberley, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli. Morì nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Leuca de Mobberleyは1178年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアモバーリーで生まれた。1180年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアモバーリーでSir John de Hellesbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Leuca de Mobberley(은)는 1178년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 모브벌리에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1180년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 모브벌리에서 Sir John de Hellesby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Leuca de Mobberley nasceu em 1178, em Mobberley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Sir John de Hellesby em 1180, em Mobberley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos. Ela faleceu em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Leuca de Mobberley родилась в 1178 г. в местности моббирли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Hellesby в 1180 г. в местности моббирли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Она умерла в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Leuca de Mobberley nació en 1178, en Mobberley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Sir John de Hellesby en 1180, en Mobberley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos. Murió en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
